title: fees.rs select_notes is dead code — tx_builder uses its own select_notes_spendable
description: fees.rs exports select_notes (operating on &[Note]) but tx_builder.rs implements its own select_notes_spendable (operating on &[SpendableNote]). payment.rs calls build_shielded_tx which calls select_notes_spendable. fees::select_notes is tested but never called from any production send path. Two implementations of the same algorithm will diverge. Either unify them or remove the dead one.
